name: homelab-draw
title: Homelab Draw
description: Browse canvases on draw.lab and open them in Draw, AI, or Present mode — or save the current scene under a name.
author: zalewskigrzegorz

commands.name: browse
commands.title: Draw: Browse
commands.subtitle: Homelab Draw
commands.description: Search canvases on draw.lab and open any of them in Draw, AI, or Present mode.

commands.name: save
commands.title: Draw: Save
commands.subtitle: Homelab Draw
commands.description: Save the current AI scene (or an existing canvas / preload) to draw.lab with a name.

preferences.name: drawUrl
preferences.title: Draw URL
preferences.description: Base URL of the draw.lab Excalidraw instance.
